title: Totally Not Real Energy Drinks
description: This mod adds various energy drinks and beverages to minecraft!
body:
# Totally Not Real Energy Drinks (Fabric) **Totally Not Real Energy Drinks** is a small Fabric mod that adds reusable drink cans and a handful of “totally not real” sodas & energy drinks brewed in a Brewing Stand. Instead of flooding your inventory with glass bottles, drinks come in stackable cans and return an **Empty Can** after drinking. ## Crafting & Brewing Recipes. ##

__Empty Can__

![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_1cf04781-0134-4279-ad00-2870b3c85e5c.png) ## __Water Can__ Hold an **Empty Can** and right click a **water-filled cauldron**. * Consumes 1 cauldron level * Gives Water Can ## Brewing Recipes (All Drinks) Brewing stands take **one ingredient at a time**, so each drink is brewed in **3 steps**:All drinks: \- are **drinkable** \- **stack to 16** \- **return an Empty Can** after drinking \--- ### Zepzi **Effect**: Strength I (10s) 1\. Water Can + **Sugar** → Zepzi (Unmixed) 2\. Zepzi (Water) + **Cocoa Beans** → Zepzi (Base) 3\. Zepzi (Base) + **Redstone** → Zepzi \--- ### Fantastic **Effect**: Jump Boost I (10s) 1\. Water Can + **Golden Carrot** → Fantastic (Unmixed) 2\. Fantastic (Water) + **Chorus Fruit** → Fantastic (Base) 3\. Fantastic (Base) + **Sugar** → **Fantastic** \--- ### Spirit **Effect**: Speed I (10s) 1\. Water Can + **Apple** → Spirit (Unmixed) 2\. Spirit (Water) + **Soul Sand** → Spirit (Base) 3\. Spirit (Base) + **Rabbit’s Foot** → **Spirit** \--- ### Redcow **Effect**: Regeneration I (5s) 1\. Water Can + **Cooked Beef** → Redcow (Unmixed) 2\. Redcow (Water) + **Sugar** → Redcow (Base) 3\. Redcow (Base) + **Glistering Melon Slice** → **Redcow** \--- ### Monstrosity **Effect**: Speed I (10s) + Strength I (10s) 1\. Water Can + **Ender Pearl** → Monstrosity (Unmixed) 2\. Monstrosity (Water) + **Ink Sac** → Monstrosity (Base) 3\. Monstrosity (Base) + **Sugar** → **Monstrosity** \--- ### Monstrosity White **Effect**: Speed II (10s) 1\. Water Can + **Eye of Ender** → Monstrosity White (Unmixed) 2\. Monstrosity White (Water) + **Glow Ink Sac** → Monstrosity White (Base) 3\. Monstrosity White (Base) + **Fermented Spider Eye** → **Monstrosity White** **Please feel free to comment any drinks you'd like to see or any bugs you encounter!**
